steps.title: Identify the probability formula
steps.content: For a random selection, we need the probability of selecting a bead with a defect. The probability of any event is the ratio of favorable outcomes to total possible outcomes.

steps.title: Apply the formula with the given values
steps.content:
From the problem: 29 out of every 100 beads have a defect.

$$P(\text{defect}) = \frac{29}{100}$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
